series_metadata.series_description: Voluntary payment of sales/use tax owed by individuals on casual sales, snowmobiles or all purpose vehicles.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 1 year, transfer to record (agency) center for 3 years then destroy by shredding. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain in office 1 year, transfer to record (agency) center for 3 years then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
